welcome.greeting: Hi! I'm {{name}}, your new agent. Tell me about what you'd like help with: you can describe a task in your own words, share a few details about how you like things done, or attach files that give me context. The more you tell me, the better my work will fit what you need. What would you like to start with?

composer.dropDescription: Drop them here to add them to the conversation
composer.imagePasteUnavailable: Couldn't read the pasted image. Try dragging the file in instead.

dictation.micDenied: Houston needs microphone access. Allow it in system settings, then try again.

empty.title: Start a conversation
empty.description: Type a message to talk to your assistant.

interaction.signinReason: Sign in to Houston to continue.
interaction.signinDescription: Your accounts stay yours; the agent acts on your behalf.

planReady.title: Plan ready
planReady.runAutopilotMessage: Go ahead and finish it on your own.

errors.missionRowFailed: We could not save this mission to your board. Your message was still sent.

providerError.reconnectedContinue: I'm signed in again. Please continue where you left off. If my last message hasn't been answered yet, answer it now.

attachmentIssues.title: Some files were not attached
attachmentIssues.description: Houston kept your prompt and the files it can use.

reasons.blockedType: This file type cannot be used here.

composio.followupFailed: Couldn't tell the assistant that {{name}} is connected

composioSignin.description: Sign in to let your assistant use your apps. Default provider: Composio.
composioSignin.alreadySignedIn: You're signed in to your integrations provider

modeSelector.coworkerDescription: Works with you: gets things done and asks when unsure.
modeSelector.plannerDescription: Writes a plan for you to approve first. Makes no changes.
modeSelector.autopilotDescription: Finishes the task on its own with what it has. No questions asked.

modelDescriptions.gpt-5_4-mini: Small, fast, and cost-efficient for simpler tasks.
modelDescriptions.claude-sonnet-5: Newest Sonnet. Stronger agentic coding and tool use.
modelDescriptions.claude-sonnet-4-6: Best balance of speed and quality.
modelDescriptions.claude-opus-4-8: Latest Opus. Better alignment and agentic coding than 4.7.
modelDescriptions.claude-fable-5: Most capable model. Costs 2x more credits than Opus 4.8.
modelDescriptions.claude-opus-4-7: Previous flagship. Strong coding autonomy and complex reasoning.

contextCompacted: Earlier conversation summarized so the chat can keep going

providerSwitch.title: Switch to {{provider}}?
providerSwitch.replayBody: Switching brings this whole conversation over to {{provider}} so it can continue with full context. Reloading the conversation uses a considerable amount of tokens, and more the larger the conversation is right now. Continue?
providerSwitch.summaryBody: {{provider}} has a smaller context window, so the whole conversation won't fit. We'll summarize it so {{provider}} can continue. Summarizing uses tokens and may lose some detail. Continue?
